disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Constant pounding, racing heartbeat at rest for hours, markedly worse tonight
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the racing heart — is it there even when you sit still?
How fast does it feel, and is it constant or coming in waves?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's constant — even sitting completely still my heart is pounding and racing, and my smartwatch keeps showing around 130 to 135. It won't slow down no matter what I do.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden severe worsening tonight with inability to rise from a chair or walk safely
trigger_question_examples: You mentioned you can't get up — can you walk or stand at all right now?
How is your strength tonight compared with earlier?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My legs have gone really weak — I can't push myself up out of the chair without help tonight, and I'm frightened I'll fall if I try to walk.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Unintentional weight loss of about 12 kg over two months despite increased appetite
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've dropped about 12 kilos in two months without trying — and the strange thing is I've been eating more than usual, not less.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Persistent heat intolerance and drenching sweats — air conditioning on full through winter
trigger_question_examples: Have you been feeling unusually hot or sweaty?
How do you cope with temperature lately?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm boiling all the time — I've had the air conditioning on full through winter and I'm still sweating through my clothes, while my roommate is sitting there in a coat.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Fine resting tremor of the hands severe enough to prevent holding a glass
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the shaking — when does it happen?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My hands shake with a fine tremble all the time now, even resting in my lap — I can't hold a glass of water without spilling it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Eyes appear increasingly prominent and staring over recent weeks (bystander-observed)
trigger_question_examples: Has anyone noticed a change in your eyes or face?
Do your eyes feel different — gritty, staring, or bulging?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My roommate keeps saying my eyes look like they're bulging and staring more than they used to over the last few weeks.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No regular medicines and no recent iodine-containing contrast or amiodarone exposure
trigger_question_examples: Are you taking any regular medicines or supplements?
Have you had any recent scans with contrast dye or heart medicines?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't take any regular medicines at all, and I haven't had any scans with dye or any heart tablets.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever spikes, confusion, chest pain, or breathlessness at rest at the time of contact
trigger_question_examples: Do you have a high fever, confusion, chest pain, or trouble breathing at rest right now?
Has your thinking felt foggy or agitated?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I don't have chest pain or trouble breathing sitting here, and I'm thinking clearly — but I feel awful and my heart just won't stop racing.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I'm not sure — I just feel like something bad is building.
